name: provenance manifest validator accepts a manifest with all top-level section 2.8 blocks
command: printf '{"commit":"abc","timestamp":"2026-05-13T00:00:00Z","author_human":"alice","ai_involvement":{"tier":"x","models_used":[],"agents_invoked":[],"skills_invoked":[],"prompts":[]},"rubric_state":{"rubric_hash":"x","rules_evaluated":[],"rules_passed":[],"rules_blocked":[]},"standards_state":{},"pr_corpus_state":{},"compliance_state":{},"human_review":{},"cost_telemetry":{"tokens_in":0,"tokens_out":0,"model":"x","duration_ms":0,"monetary_estimate_usd":0},"decision_provenance":{"adrs":[],"architect_session_id":"x","decisions_referenced":[]},"signature":"sha256:abc"}\n' > prov.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/validate-provenance-manifest.sh" --manifest prov.json 2>out.txt && grep -q 'valid=true' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
